use_cases: SaaS subscription pricing with monthly/yearly toggle
Service tier selection with animated price transitions
Membership pricing page with billing period switching
Interactive pricing cards for product launches
ai_summary: An interactive pricing component featuring a smooth sliding toggle for switching between monthly and yearly billing periods, with animated price transitions using the NumberFlow library. Includes selectable plan cards (Starter/Pro) with visual feedback on selection. Clean, minimalist design with rounded corners, subtle shadows, and professional typography ideal for SaaS and subscription-based services.
